mostInteresting.reason: Blockdaemon's integration of Morpho's Earn Stack via no-code widget for wallet providers, custodians, and fintechs represents a direct competitive threat to Kamino. This infrastructure play enables seamless yield embedding across multiple applications—the exact distribution strategy Kamino pursues through Privy. The ability to embed curated vaults without code lowers barriers to adoption and could accelerate Morpho's market penetration on competing chains, potentially siphoning liquidity and users from Kamino's lending infrastructure.
